matches.rationale: The Edit rule directly targets imports from 'ui', matching the shared-UI import action. Its evidence also mentions _Shadcn_ form variants, but 1:1 matching assigns this combined extraction to the closer, pattern-backed import rule.
The Write rule targets files under packages/ui and its evidence explicitly requires checking packages/ui/index.tsx before creating a primitive.
The Edit rule detects hardcoded hexadecimal and arbitrary Tailwind color values, and its evidence forbids hardcoded colors.
The Edit rule targets one-off Studio keyboard handlers and explicitly prefers registered, discoverable shortcuts, matching the keyboard-shortcut handling intent.
The Edit rule is scoped to the Studio shortcut registry and its evidence explicitly reserves 'G then ...' sequences for navigation.
The Write rule targets Studio TypeScript component files and requires sub-components to be placed with their parent.
The Write rule targets Studio index.ts/index.tsx creation and explicitly says to avoid barrel re-export files.

misses.note: The pnpm 10 requirement is present only in the repository-description sentence; no extracted Bash rule targets package or monorepo commands generally.
The Node >= 22 prerequisite is stated in descriptive repository metadata, but no extracted Bash rule targets Node-based repository commands.

The compiler merged this form-primitive requirement into ui-import-shadcn-form-variants. That extracted rule is used for the closer import target g10, and its trigger does not independently target form-primitive usage, so 1:1 matching leaves g11 unmatched.
The compound styling sentence was not decomposed into a rule requiring Tailwind-only styling; the sole styling extraction covers only hardcoded colors.
The compound styling sentence was not decomposed into a rule requiring semantic Tailwind color tokens; the sole styling extraction covers only hardcoded colors.

The compiler extracted a narrower keyboard-listener rule and used it for the closer keyboard-shortcut preference g18, but did not extract the broader requirement binding repeated Studio UI actions to both the shared registry and Shortcut primitives.
